title: CONNECTIONS CAFE COMMUNITY DINING - 211info
text: MILL CITY MEAL SITE CONNECTIONS CAFE COMMUNITY DINING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a dine in hot meal. 236 SW Broadway Mill City, OR 97360 Eligibility: Must be an established Meals on Wheels of Linn, Benton, Lincoln participant and meet on of the following: -Age 60 and older and their spouses -Age 55 and older who identify as Native American -Age 18 and older with disabilities Hours: Tuesday/Thursday noon (503) 897-2204 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 897-2204 Intake (541) 967-8630 Linn & Benton Counties Adrc Intake (541) 336-2289 Lincoln County Adrc INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Meals must be reserved in advance. New clients must call ADRC to become an established Meals on Wheels participant. FEES: None, donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Gates, Lyons, and Mill City (Linn County only) Services: Congregate Meals/Nutrition Sites Congregate Meals/Nutrition Sites * Native American Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MILL CITY MEAL SITE
